summary: Completed testing of MEDVET News and Newsletter features. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified: double header menu (top green bar + bottom cream bar), MEDVET News page with 10 seed articles, category filtering, newsletter subscribe/unsubscribe, and language selector (PT/EN/ES).

issues: Minor: Schedule button shows 'Book ConsultationAgendar' - text concatenation issue when switching languages

passed_tests: GET /api/news returns 10 seed articles
News articles have required fields (id, title, source, author, link, summary, category, date)
GET /api/news?category=acupuntura returns filtered articles
GET /api/news?category=cbd returns filtered articles
GET /api/news?category=ozonioterapia returns filtered articles
GET /api/news?category=nonexistent returns empty list
News sources are real scientific journals (PubMed, Frontiers, JAVMA, SciELO, etc.)
POST /api/newsletter/subscribe works for new email
POST /api/newsletter/subscribe handles duplicate email correctly
POST /api/newsletter/unsubscribe works for existing email
POST /api/newsletter/unsubscribe returns 404 for nonexistent email
Resubscription after unsubscribe works correctly
All 10 news categories have articles
Homepage loads with double header (top green bar + bottom cream bar)
Top bar shows 'Para Tutores' and 'Para Veterinários' buttons
Top bar shows News link, PT/EN/ES selector, Login, 'Agendar Consulta' button
Bottom bar shows 8 items: Nossa Missão, Equipe, Terapias, Produtos, Vídeos, Depoimentos, Cursos + MEDVET News highlighted
MEDVET News page (/noticias) loads with 10 scientific articles
News articles show title, source, author, date and 'Ver publicação original' link
News filter by category works (tested acupuntura filter)
Newsletter subscribe form works - shows 'Inscrito com sucesso!' message
Newsletter unsubscribe works - shows 'E-mail descadastrado da newsletter' toast
Language selector PT/EN/ES works in header
No JavaScript errors on homepage and /noticias
seed_data_creation: Newsletter test emails created during testing with unique UUIDs (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MEDVET News and Newsletter features fully tested. News articles are SEED DATA (hardcoded in SEED_NEWS list in server.py, not fetched from real journals). Newsletter emails stored in MongoDB (no real email sending - MOCKED). Double header menu working with top green bar (bg-[#2C4C3B]) and bottom cream bar (bg-[#F9F6F0]).

mocked_apis.News_articles: Seed data (10 hardcoded articles from real journal names)
mocked_apis.Newsletter: MongoDB storage only (no real email sending)

features: 10 seed scientific articles from real journal names
Article cards with title, source, author, date, summary
seed_articles_sources: Journal of the American Veterinary Medical Association
Veterinary and Comparative Orthopaedics and Traumatology
